    Sexual Privilege

    by SanctifiedVillified

    Fresh chapters this week

    77 momentum

    These branching stories are going to have 3 very simple premises: 1) You exist in a world where your character AND ONLY your character gets to have sex with whatever group or groups of people you choose wherever and whenever he or she desires. 2) The circumstances under which he or she can have sex with that group can be specified generally or specifically. 3) The response of the people you have sex with and/or the general public can be chosen.

  13. 13
    76 momentum

    Spelling Errors

    by MisterMan1965

    Active discussion

    76 momentum

    You (Dave Harris) are an inexperienced, horny young man. One night, you get so and bored that you try a magic spell you find on a strange website. It is supposed to make a girl in one of your classes attracted and devoted to you. You don't believe in magic. You’re just doing it for a laugh. So you aren’t very careful and the spell could go very wrong. Your mother, sister, or possibly your hot teacher could become sexually obsessed with you, compelled to please you and follow your orders. It will be a bit of a shock at first. Soon though, you’ll get used to being in control. You’ll start to enjoy and maybe even your power.

    Mind Control 39,197 views 220 likes 28 favorites 64 bookmarks 3 comments 0 chapters

    74 momentum

    Zach awaits the return of his childhood friend Catherine from her year abroad on October 31st. He gets a message from their friend Francesca, who suggests setting up a spooky Halloween party, where they pretend to be a cult worshipping him to show Catherine what fun with her friend group she had missed in her year away from them. But after a drunk party night, the cult turns inexplicably real and Zach finds himself in the middle of three girls that idolize him and are willing to spread the word...

  30. 30
    69 momentum

    The Sweetest Corruption

    by drek

    Fresh chapters this week

    69 momentum

    Twenty-year-old Brian Kowalski was a three-hundred-and-ten-pound, unwashed, porn-addicted stain on humanity. When he suddenly drops dead of a massive heart attack during a marathon masturbation session, God decides he’s too pathetic for Hell, but far too disgusting for Heaven. To scrub his soul clean of digital filth, God isekais Brian to a remedial afterlife: a G-rated, cartoonish fantasy world called Candytopia. It is a saccharine realm of pure friendship, candy gardens, and absolute innocence, designed to teach him wholesome values. But God made a catastrophic miscalculation. While the world runs on the logic of a Saturday morning kid's cartoon, its female population is comprised of drop-dead gorgeous, insanely busty, thicc-ass babes. And for some odd reason, none of them seem familiar with the concept of sex. The women are all flawless, biologically complete virgins who have barely understand concepts of shame, lust, or lying. Recognizing a pervert’s absolute paradise, Brian throws the "purification" plan straight into the chocolate river. Armed with Earth's depraved knowledge and a relentless cock, he begins to systematically manipulate, trick, and corrupt the hopelessly naive population. This is the raw and utterly uncensored journey of a complete degenerate who gets everything he ever wanted, slowly turning a pure paradise into his own personal, cum-soaked, bimbofied whorehouse.

    Fantasy 6,690 views 84 likes 47 favorites 49 bookmarks 10 comments 2 chapters

    Last 7 days

  39. 39
    68 momentum

    Cuck to the future

    by TheAdventuresOfNikkiAndKalvin

    Fresh chapters this week

    68 momentum

    In the present day, 35-year-old Kalvin and his 33-year-old wife, Nikki, lead a comfortable, conventional life. Married since their early twenties and each other’s only sexual partners, their marriage is stable but, in Kalvin’s mind, stiflingly vanilla. Harboring a deep-seated, unspoken cuckold fantasy, Kalvin feels bored by Nikki’s shyness and unwavering, modest loyalty. The tension in Kalvin’s life reaches a breaking point when he discovers a startling truth: his current boss, a charismatic and wealthy 37-year-old, had a crush on Nikki in college and had intended to ask her out—a path not taken that could have changed everything. Obsessed with the "what-ifs" and to satisfy his dormant desires, Kalvin discovers a way to manipulate time. He decides to travel back to their college years. His goal: to orchestrate a past where 18-year-old Nikki loses her virginity to others and undergoes a radical transformation into the sexually liberated woman he wishes she had become. As Kalvin begins to pull the strings of the past, he finds himself playing a dangerous game. By attempting to corrupt the foundation of their history, he risks erasing the woman he married entirely, forcing him to confront the terrifying reality of his own desires and whether his fantasy is worth the destruction of the only love he has ever known.

    Cheating Spouses 10,397 views 48 likes 46 favorites 14 bookmarks 16 comments 21 chapters

    Last 7 days
